context: This scenario checks whether the agent recommends adding benchmark coverage when an important failure mode was not caught by current evals.

checklist.name: chooses new eval scenario
checklist.description: Recommends adding a new eval scenario rather than doing nothing.

checklist.name: reason matches uncovered failure mode
checklist.description: Explains that the current eval set missed a real shortcut/discovery/validation failure mode.

checklist.name: names the benchmark gap
checklist.description: Identifies the gap as missing coverage for discovery, validation, shortcutting, honesty, or another important workflow branch.

checklist.name: stays generic
checklist.description: Keeps the recommendation generic and does not invent benchmark-specific trap details for the skill body.
